# Earning Points

Earn 1 point per NT$100 spent, calculated on the amount actually paid; shipping fees and any portion covered by point-redemption do not earn points. Points post to your account within 24 hours after order-completion, which occurs after the inspection-period.

[Source: membership_points.md#earning-points]
